name: §dGuardian
description:
§8Enchanting Pet

§7Defense: §a50
§7Intelligence: §b100

§6Laserbeam
§7Zaps your enemies for §b20x §7your §b✎
§bIntelligence §7every §a3s§7.

§6Enchanting Wisdom Boost

§6Mana Pool
§7Regenerate §b30% §7extra mana, doubled
§7when near or in water

§6Lucky Seven
§7Gain §b+?% §7chance to find §5ultra rare
§7books in §dSuperpairs§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Watcher Guardian Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§7Guardian pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
